text: four months, no sleep, i make it look easy
two suits, big plans, blank door, no name
they know the law, i run the game
calls at midnight, fonts and faces
logos, lights, setting the paces
they're the idea, i'm the execution
fast-tracking every single resolution
i'm the vision, i'm the revolution
3-6-5, it's an evolution
if it works, then no one knows
if it breaks, it always shows
opening day, no mistakes
chrome and glass, i orchestrate
i'm the logic, every bit
my fingerprints are all over it
opening day, all on time
every detail, every line
low-key but it's a god-tier flex
everything i do is so complex
pens hit paper, keys in hand
every detail goes to plan
doors swing open, i disappear
